overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game featuring a warrior in ancient Greek armor walking through a sunlit marble plaza toward an ornate temple entrance flanked by large dolphin statues. The environment showcases classical fantasy architecture with white stone, teal banners, and elaborate bronze doors.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the marble plaza toward the temple entrance, passing between large dolphin statues

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking past the player character toward the background

entered.detail: large classical temple with tall columns and teal banners
large stone dolphin sculpture on pedestal flanking the path
large stone dolphin sculpture on pedestal flanking the path
elaborately decorated bronze temple doors with geometric patterns
wide paved area with light-colored stone tiles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit marble plaza toward an imposing temple facade. Large dolphin statues flank the approach on both sides, while teal banners hang between the columns. A robed NPC passes by on the right as the character maintains a steady pace toward the ornate bronze doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with columns and decorative urns

events.description: character turns left toward the temple side entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the temple entrance, moving past decorative urns and a small water feature

notable_agents.action: temple guard or priest standing near the entrance doors

entered.detail: white marble stairs ascending to the left side of the temple
large decorative pottery vessels lined up near the entrance
rectangular water feature with blue tiles

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward the temple entrance, bringing the ornate bronze doors into closer view on the right. The right dolphin statue exits the frame as decorative ceramic urns and a small reflecting pool come into view on the left. The character approaches the side entrance where a temple figure stands near the doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit marble plaza that narrows into a focused approach toward a temple entrance. It begins with the character walking toward an imposing facade, passing between large dolphin statues and teal banners while a robed figure crosses the path. As the character maintains a steady pace, the perspective shifts with a left turn that brings the ornate bronze doors into closer view on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal decorative ceramic urns and a small reflecting pool on the left as the right dolphin statue exits the frame. Finally, the camera closes in on the side entrance where a temple figure stands waiting by the doors.
